hero.heading: Speak English. Make Content. Meet the World.
hero.subheading: Learn English by doing — not memorizing. VibeLingo uses TikTok challenges, WhatsApp check-ins, and AI voice chats to help you sound natural, grow your audience, and connect globally.
hero.image_alt: Illustration of a learner using VibeLingo

features_blocks.title: Why VibeLingo Works
features_blocks.description: We don’t just say “memorize this.” We give you feedback, tools, and a real purpose for learning English.

items.title: Not Just Grammar
items.desc: We teach English with TikToks, voice chats, and real-world conversation — not random worksheets.

items.title: Start With Your WHY
items.desc: Before anything else, we talk about what English will do for you. That purpose keeps you motivated.

items.title: AI Voice Coaching
items.desc: Speak English with ChatGPT’s voice mode — we’ll guide you live to build fluency and confidence fast.

items.title: Weekly Feedback
items.desc: Each week, check in and get personal feedback on your progress. It’s simple, supportive, and flexible.

items.title: Content-Based Learning
items.desc: You’ll learn English by actually creating content — reels, stories, captions, and real-life interactions.

items.title: Free to Start
items.desc: No pressure. Join the WhatsApp group, follow us, and start learning. You only pay when you want live support.

features_home.title: How Your English Journey Unfolds
features_home.description: Learn by doing, not memorizing. This is how your journey looks — from finding your purpose to building your voice in English.

tabs.title: Start with Purpose
tabs.description: Before learning anything, you’ll define a personal WHY — a real reason to learn English that keeps you motivated. It could be for your family, your dream job, or your online brand.

tabs.title: Get Familiar, Not Overwhelmed
tabs.description: Instead of jumping into grammar, you start by watching selected YouTube videos and curated playlists. You absorb sounds, patterns, and confidence — even if you don’t speak yet.

tabs.title: Begin Speaking in Small Steps
tabs.description: You’ll start by labeling objects and sending voice notes. As your confidence builds, you’ll practice real situations like food orders or voice memes with your coach.

tabs.title: Create, Get Feedback, Improve
tabs.description: Once you’re ready, you’ll post TikTok-style assignments, talk to peers, and meet weekly with a coach who gives real feedback. Your English grows with your content.

features_home_02.title: From Purpose to Progress
features_home_02.description: VibeLingo isn’t about rules — it’s about real motivation, consistent exposure, and creative feedback that fits your life.

tabs.title: Define Your WHY
tabs.description: Before any English practice, you’ll define your personal purpose. Whether it’s traveling, freelancing, or family — your WHY will keep you consistent.

tabs.title: Familiarize First
tabs.description: You’ll spend the first few weeks watching curated playlists to recognize patterns and sounds — no pressure to speak yet.

tabs.title: Grow With Content
tabs.description: You’ll start making content (like duets, captions, memes) while checking in weekly via WhatsApp for real feedback from your coach.

features_home_03.title: Learn English by creating, not cramming

articles.title: Speak Like a Local
articles.description: Our AI voice chats and weekly roleplays help you sound real — not robotic. Learn modern phrases, accents, and confidence.

articles.title: Create to Learn
articles.description: Instead of grammar worksheets, you’ll post reels, explain memes, and record voice notes — all in real English.

articles.title: Community = Consistency
articles.description: Weekly WhatsApp tasks and group challenges keep you on track. You're never alone in your learning journey.

pricing.title: Start free. Pay only when you're growing.
pricing.subtitle: VibeLingo is free to start — you unlock lessons by posting, not paying. Only pay for personalized coaching or advanced tools when you’re ready.

free.name: Free Start
free.desc: Follow-first model. Start learning with free videos, tasks, and challenges.
free.whatsapp_msg: Hi! I want to start the Free Start plan.

weekly.name: Weekly Coaching
weekly.desc: Stay on track with a 10-min weekly call, voice feedback, and unlock our MP3 pack.
weekly.whatsapp_msg: Hi! I want Weekly Coaching for 7 dollars.

ai.name: AI Deep-Dive
ai.desc: Practice English live using ChatGPT Voice mode. You speak, we guide.
ai.whatsapp_msg: Hi! I want to book an AI Deep-Dive session.

audit.name: Western English Audit
audit.desc: We’ll analyze your local store (in the country you're currently in) — signage, speech, tone — and suggest how to sound more modern and native.
audit.whatsapp_msg: Hi! I want a Western English Audit for my store.

content.name: Content Assistance
content.desc: Need help editing your videos or creating engaging content in English? We’ve got your back.
content.whatsapp_msg: Hi! I'm interested in Content Assistance for my videos.
